---
title: "Employment"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">Lecturer in Applied Statistics</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">Jan 2024 – Present</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Leading and collaborating on interdisciplinary research in applied statistics with real-world impact.</li>
    <li>Teaching statistical theory and methods across undergraduate to PhD levels.</li>
    <li>Assisting in research projects through the application of collaborator-specified statistical approaches.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">Senior Statistical Ecologist</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">Animal &amp; Plant Health Agency &middot; Sand Hutton, England</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">May 2022 – Jan 2024</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Led statistics and mentoring, developing bespoke methods for policy-driven projects across multidisciplinary teams.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Fellow</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">Dec 2021 – May 2022</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Coordinated and delivered a highly rated, fully online undergraduate statistics course with strong student engagement.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">Research Fellow</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">Jun 2021 – Feb 2022</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Conducted international ecological research, including study design and simulation modelling for species management.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Fellow</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">Dec 2020 – May 2021</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Course coordinator for undergraduate statistical course.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
